general.steam_controller_notice: External controller isn't detected? Try the steamdeck-input-disabler plugin from Decky.

encryption_error.title: Something went wrong
encryption_error.text: This video couldn't be decoded. Movies aren't supported in DeckTube due to encryption. If this happens on other videos, try logging in or switching accounts.

generic.title: Settings
generic.description: Opens the DeckTube settings overlay. You can access this overlay anywhere by pressing Ctrl+O on your keyboard, or R3 on your controller

adblock.title: Ad Block
adblock.description: Seamlessly blocks video and feed ads, not subject to YouTube's methods of preventing blockers

sponsorblock.title: SponsorBlock
sponsorblock.description: Skips segments in YouTube videos using a crowdsourced database. Choose which categories to skip below

dearrow.title: DeArrow
dearrow.description: Replaces titles and thumbnails with more accurate, less sensationalized versions from a public crowdsourced database. Slows down loading, as it has to fetch info from the server

dislikes.title: Return Dislikes
dislikes.description: Uses community data from the Return YouTube Dislike API (returnyoutubedislike.com) to show rough dislike counts. Slows down video loading, as it has to fetch info from the server

remove_super_resolution.title: Remove Super Resolution
remove_super_resolution.description: Remove "Super resolution" (AI upscaled) qualities from low quality videos

hide_shorts.title: Hide Shorts
hide_shorts.description: Hides YouTube Shorts from the home feed, subscriptions and search

h264ify.title: Filter Video Codecs
h264ify.description: Codec filtering options. Relaunch after toggling any of the options.
h264ify.enable_description: Enables the codec filter. This can help with performance and battery life on slower devices, but may reduce the available resolutions.

hardware_decoding.title: Hardware Decoding
hardware_decoding.description: Uses your GPU to decode videos when possible. Disabling this may fix playback issues, but can cause lag depending on your CPU. Relaunch after toggling

wayland_hdr.title: Wayland HDR
wayland_hdr.description: Enables HDR when using Wayland, but can cause desaturated colors on unsupported platforms. Relaunch after toggling

low_memory_mode.title: Low Memory Mode
low_memory_mode.description: Tells YouTube to enable low memory mode, which may improve performance on slower devices at the cost of some visual effects. Relaunch after toggling

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen
fullscreen.description: Enables fullscreen, and makes DeckTube always launch in fullscreen

no_window_decorations.title: No Window Decorations
no_window_decorations.description: Disables window decorations, including the title bar and window border. Relaunch after toggling

keep_on_top.title: Keep on Top
keep_on_top.description: Enables Keep on Top, and makes DeckTube launch with the window pinned on top of every other window

pause_on_blur.title: Pause on Blur
pause_on_blur.description: Pause current video when DeckTube loses focus (e.g. tabbing out or minimizing the window)

userstyles.title: Custom CSS (Userstyles)
userstyles.description: Place .css files in the userstyles folder to customize the interface. Changes are applied automatically

touch_overlay.title: Touch Overlay
touch_overlay.description: Enables on-screen touch controls for easier navigation when touch input is detected

controller_support.title: Controller Support
controller_support.description: Enables support for game controllers, including navigation and video playback controls. Requires an external controller, such as an Xbox controller

mac_permissions.title: Permissions
mac_permissions.description: Manage macOS permissions used by DeckTube.
mac_permissions.microphone_description: Used only when you start YouTube voice search.
mac_permissions.restart_required: Changes made in macOS Settings require relaunching DeckTube.
mac_permissions.request_granted: Microphone access is allowed. No permission prompt is needed.
mac_permissions.request_not_determined: macOS still has not shown a permission prompt. Use Reset Permission Prompt, then try again.
mac_permissions.request_denied_help: macOS will not show the permission prompt again while access is denied. Turn it on in macOS Settings, then relaunch DeckTube.
mac_permissions.request_failed: DeckTube could not request microphone access. Open macOS Settings and relaunch the app after changing access.
mac_permissions.resetting_microphone: Resetting the saved macOS microphone decision...

themes.title: Theme
themes.description: Apply a colour theme to the interface. Themes only change colours, so they never affect navigation.

splash.title: Boot Animation
splash.description: Play the YouTube logo animation when DeckTube launches

cleanup.title: Clean Up
cleanup.description: Remove features you don't want. These are DeckTube removals, not YouTube settings.

quality.title: Video Quality
quality.description: Force a preferred or maximum resolution. Useful for saving battery and data on the Deck.

sleep_timer.title: Sleep Timer
sleep_timer.description: Pause playback after a set time, or at the end of the current video.

keep_awake.title: Keep Awake
keep_awake.description: Stop the screen sleeping while a video is playing. Fixes the Steam Deck sleeping mid-video.

remove_ask_gemini.title: Remove Ask (Gemini)
remove_ask_gemini.description: Removes the Gemini-powered Ask button from the video bar.

remove_end_screens.title: Remove End Screens
remove_end_screens.description: Hides the grid of suggested videos that covers the end of a video.

remove_info_cards.title: Remove Info Cards
remove_info_cards.description: Hides the info cards and the 'i' teaser that pop up over videos.

disable_autoplay.title: Disable Autoplay
disable_autoplay.description: Stops the next video playing automatically when one ends.

remove_comments.title: Remove Comments
remove_comments.description: Hides the comments section on the watch page.

dismiss_are_you_there.title: Skip 'Are You Still Watching'
dismiss_are_you_there.description: Automatically dismisses the inactivity prompt so playback never stops to ask.

sponsorblock_selfpromo.title: Skip Self-Promotion
sponsorblock_selfpromo.description: Skip unpaid self or product promotion.

sponsorblock_preview.title: Skip Previews
sponsorblock_preview.description: Skip previews and recaps of the video's own content.

sponsorblock_music_offtopic.title: Skip Non-Music
sponsorblock_music_offtopic.description: In music videos, skip the non-music sections.

setting.title: Donate
setting.description: DeckTube is a fork of VacuumTube by shy. Support the original developer by visiting shy.rocks/donate, or by pressing the button below to open the donation page in your browser
